feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: price change getting error in MR21
entry.content:
Dear Guru's

I have done by material price change process in MR21 but i getting some error in price change screen please refer the below snap

please give your feedback above error

Regards

VIGNESH

entry.title: crowd worforce generate registration link
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i'm trying to learn the crowd workforce , so i followed the instruction in SAP help and tried to generate a link for the registration but it didn't work, could anyone help me ?

thank you

entry.title: CDS for Bill of material item and dependency.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have configured variant config in SAP S4HANA Public cloud system and maintain a super BOM in which dependencies are assigned to its components. 

Ex-- we have a KMAT material (A) and its variant materials (AB, AC, AD). when we check the BOM for material-A in CS13, super BOM is displayed with lets say 20 component. But when we check BOM for material-AB, only 5 components are displayed as per dependency assignment in super BOM.

Now the requirement is to create a report for details of BOM Component for variant material (which will show BOM details of AB, AC, AD.) I have checked in public cloud system but did not found any CDS where I can find a link between dependency and BOM item.

Is there any other CDS which I can use for this purpose.

Thanks.

entry.title: Need Inputs on how to download data into excel from an internal table
entry.content:
Hello,

Need inputs on below requirement:

I would like to move data into excel of an internal table which has a field that stores long text with multiple lines separated by '#' (cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline). I would like to replace "#' with some character so that it will add that entry in a new line in the downloaded excel.

Please find the below use case:

say, I have data in internal table it_tab1 with work area ls_tab1.

Now, this lstab1-<field> = string1 #string2 #string3

Now, I want input of the field in the downloaded excel as below:

string1

string2

string3

Please provide possible solutions.

Note: I have used below statement still not able to get data as expected.

REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '#' IN lstab1-<field> WITH cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline.

and I am using SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING FM to convert string to xstring.

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Delivery Line Item Deletion Validation in VL02N
entry.content:
Hi,

I have used the user exit (MV50AFZ1) for VL02N line item deletion validation. When I delete the line item and save, it throws an error. It works fine, but when I press back, a duplicate line item comes up. please help.

entry.title: Caused by: EvalError: Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an all
entry.content: hi, I'm used QR code library in SAP my UI5 application.. it's worked for locally & deploy but in SAP Work Zone  i created tile for this application...it is not working ....getting error  like this "Caused by: EvalError: Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:".  plz anyone help help me.

entry.title: Status ZU G of the user interface SAPLSVIM missing....how we can resolve this
entry.content:
GETTING THE ABOVE SUBJECT ERROR WHILE PRACTICING ....

HOW CAN WE RESOLVE THIS ERROR

entry.title: will incomplete TECO of a production order impact MRP ??
entry.content: I have a situation where i have list of production orders where TECO is not completed when MRP runs its picks up the demand and shows in correct call-off - can some one help to understand this issue. in my view if the Teco is not completed the demand should be reflecting for all the parts in that production order

entry.title: Campaigns on Servicenow
entry.content:
Dear Members

Can we count the number of clicks on specific links through service now campaigns?

entry.title: Is there any filter for Q&A community by SAP products?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Now the new community has been launched, but the questions in Q&A can't be easily identified by different SAP products, for example: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, etc., so it brings efforts to determine which product the questions are coming from, since I am only focusing on S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and other colleagues may focus on ECC, S/4HANA OP.

So it is better to add a mandatory field when posting a question to identity the specific SAP products. it can be identity which product belongs to from the default page. see screenshot below

 

Br, Bob

entry.title: Confirm MTE specifications
entry.content:
I have some questions regarding MTE S/4Hana Public Cloud.

  1. Regarding MTE, I understand that even though the accounting period is closed, it is possible to cancel service confirmations. (We have confirmed that cancellation integration is possible from Salesforce.) Is this in accordance with MTE specifications?

  2. If we cancel service confirmations from Salesforce for the two months prior to the closed accounting period, will it be deducted for the current month or the two months prior?

In STE, it was specified that cancellations of service confirmations for the month when the accounting period is closed cannot be done. Therefore, I would like to confirm the specifications on the MTE side again.

Thank you and best regards,
Kishida

entry.title: 9H Paymnet budget and 9I Commi budget Mismatch
entry.content:
We are facing the weird view in fund management after S4 HANA Migration. Our 9H payment budget consumed more than commitment budget 9I . When we checked the report and table, we find below 4 document which is triggered 9H budget only. All 4 document is 2024 year. Please find the attachment for details. 

9H (12,138,544.29) - 9I (9,906,602.82)  = Varieance 

Regards

Sarvottam Tomar

entry.title: Gross weight and net weight fields are not showing in material master
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Gross weight and net weight fields are not showing in the material master Sales: General/Plant & Basic Data 1 tab.
Usually, It appears below the Base Unit of Measure in Sales: General/Plant.

Can anyone explain? what could be the reason for it?

entry.title: Controle de cópia fatura - ordem de venda
entry.content:
Boa tarde!
Estou criando uma ordem de venda de complemento de valor com referência a uma fatura de venda.

A minha fatura possui código de imposto M2, que está cadastrado na J1BTAX com Direito Fiscal ICMS IC0, porém possui uma exceção fiscal quando o emissor e receptor são do MT, trazendo Dir.Fisc. ICMS RBI.

Ao criar uma ordem de venda referenciando a fatura de venda, a expectativa é que o Direito Fiscal apresentasse as informações da fatura. Porém os dados estão sendo validados na J1BTAX de acordo com a categoria de item e código de imposto cadastrado.

Gostaria de saber se há alguma possibiliade de puxar as informações do cód.imposto e direito fiscal no controle de cópia da VTAF. Ou se a solução seria somente criando uma nova categoria de item com o cód de imposto de já tem a exceção fiscal?

entry.title: I am executing Rebate Settlement , Credit memo generated with negative value. Change in Rebate %
entry.content:
I am executing Rebate Settlement in s4/Hana, Credit memo generated with negative value.

Reason is the Change in Rebate contract percentage previously its 12% and now it 11%. 

Need to settle credit memo in positive.

entry.title: what is Data Management and Landscape Transformation (DMLT) service from SAP
entry.content:
Hi friends,

does anyone help me to understand what is the Data Management and Landscape Transformation (DMLT) service from SAP? is it a paid service?

I have gone through the SAP note 39919 - Implementation of parallel currencies in FI

it has the below details.

Does anyone have availed this service? what is the procedure to it and do we have to pay for it?

 

Thanks in advance.

SAP Community #DataManagementandLandscapeTransformation

entry.title: Source List Fixed Vendor report plus Purchase Info Record data
entry.content: Is there a standard report in SAP (not S4 Hana) that contains the fixed vendor and the purchase info record price data for the fixed vendor?

entry.title: Erro FIEBPP-112 intergração de retorno bacario FF.5
entry.content:
Olá, pesso apoio da comunidade para que eu possa encontar uma solução do erro FIEBPP-112
Esta mensagem esta configurada como alto explicativa, porem não é possivel identificar o motivo do erro.

Ao executar a integração de um arquivo de retorno bancario atravez da FF.5, ao processar um documento que consta como codigo de retono definido como "DV - Pagamento não confirmado" o sistema deve efetuar o estorno de forma automatica, porem estou recebendo uma mensagem de erro.

Verificando durante o debug notei que existe um comentario ao lado que indica que foi implementada um Sap Note, mas pesquisando por esse numero não localizei qualquer documentação ou menção a estas notas. 

Verifiquei na SNOTE em meu sistema e não localizei estas notas instaladas.

Verifiquei que na tabela BSEGC não possue dados.

Alguem poderia dar uma direção de como identificar uma forma de corrigir este caso.
#ECC

entry.title: HI, I am having 15 years in experience in Accounts and Finance, I have completed SAP FICO training.
entry.content:
HI, I am having 15 years in experience in Accounts and Finance, I have completed SAP FICO training.

I have no practical experience by I have good theoretical knowledge in SAP FICO, I need practical knowledge in implementation projects.

Please support to do.

entry.title: transport receipts time series planning IBP
entry.content: • I have a scenario in IBP time series planning where transport  receipts are generating in excess of safety days  planned. What could be the cause for this? Projected ending inventory keeps building inventory more than what is needed.
